examples.title: Algorithm: Process Creation
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateProcess
INPUT: program name, arguments
OUTPUT: process ID

BEGIN
 1. Allocate unique Process ID (PID)
 2. Allocate memory for process
 3. Load program into memory
 4. Create Process Control Block (PCB)
 5. Set up process state to "Ready"
 6. Add to ready queue
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the process creation algorithm
